Planet+AI Summer 2024

Week 1

When: June 3- June 7, 9am-4pm with one-hour break from 11am to 12pm
Who: Ping Wang, Justin Hardin, Ben Alexander
What: Planetary explorations and planetary images, Python basics with matrix arithmetic, linear transformations, and image processing, How to use AI tools to creat artworks, digital stories and apps
Textbook: Python in high school - Algorithms and mathematics by Arnaud Bodin

A few things for Week 1:

  • Introduction to Mars
  • Satellite Imagery and Remote Sensing
  • Mars Missions
  • HiRISE
  • Element Maps
  • Materials on the Moon
  • Introduction to the Moon
  • Missions to the Moon (1)
  • Missions to the Moon (2)

  • Missions to the Moon (3)

  • 01-basics
  • 01-exercises
  • 02-exercises
  • 02-matrix-images
  • 02-for-loops-functions
  • 03-dictionaries
  • 03-plots
  • 04-tuples
  • 04-rotation-matrix
  • 04-Patrick Winston on Decision Tree
  • 04-pandas
  • 05-json
  • 05-html

Colabs for you to try:

  • color-transfer [article]
  • style-transfer [article]
  • stable-diffusion-webui
  • chatbot

Week 2

When: June 10- June 14, 9am-4pm with one-hour break from 11am to 12pm
Who: Layal Bou Hamdan
What: Math for AI/ML for high school students

  • day1.ipynb

  • day1_practice.ipynb

  • day2.ipynb

  • day2_practice.ipynb

  • day3.ipynb

  • day3_practice.ipynb

  • day4.ipynb

  • day4_practice.ipynb

  • day5.ipynb
  • day5_practice.ipynb

Week 3

When: June 17- June 21, 9am-4pm with one-hour break from 11am to 12pm
Who: Pengyu Hong, Zhengyang Zhou
What: Convolutional Neural Networks, and other topics

AI/ML

  • Introduction to AI/ML

  • Main types of ML

  • KMeans_colab
  • Linear_regression_colab
  • KMeans_data1
  • KMeans_data2
  • customer_data

MLP

  • hand_written_digit_recognition_colab

  • style_transfer

Convolutional Neural Netowrks

  • convolution_colab
  • hand_written_digit_recognition_with_cnn_colab
  • simplified_butterfly_recognition_colab
  • butterfly_recognition_colab
  • an interative demo for practice

Vision Transformer

  • vision_transformer_slides
  • word_embedding_colab
  • simplified_vit_butterfly_recognition_colab
  • vit_butterfly_recognition_colab

Diffusion Models

  • diffusers_colab
